overall.description: A first-person exploration of a luxurious, dimly lit futuristic apartment interior from a video game. The camera moves through a spacious lounge featuring a large holographic jellyfish display, enters a dark corridor with green neon lighting, and returns to explore the seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury lounge with holographic art installation

events.description: holographic jellyfish illuminates the space with bright blue light as camera approaches
holographic display passes overhead and exits the field of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the luxury lounge toward the holographic display

entered.detail: vertical wooden slats forming a partial room divider near the entrance
large glowing blue translucent jellyfish hologram floating in the center of the room
low modern sofas with dark upholstery arranged around the space
recessed warm amber lighting strips along the floor perimeter

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a luxurious, dimly lit lounge through a wooden slatted partition. A large blue holographic jellyfish floats in the center of the space, growing larger as the camera approaches. The room features modern low furniture and warm ambient floor lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area leading to service corridor

events.description: approaching dark corridor entrance with green neon accent lighting
ambient lighting shifts from warm to dark with green neon highlights

agents.ego_description: walking toward the dark corridor at the back of the lounge

entered.detail: large framed abstract painting on the far wall
dark doorway leading to a narrow corridor
doorway outlined with glowing green neon light strips

segments.scene_description: Having passed the hologram, the camera moves through the back of the lounge toward a dark corridor. The lighting becomes dimmer as the camera approaches a doorway framed with green neon lights. Abstract artwork hangs on the walls in this transition area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with neon accent lighting

events.description: entering the dark corridor illuminated by green neon door frames
turning around in the corridor to exit back toward the main room

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow dark corridor illuminated only by green neon strips

entered.detail: continuous glowing green neon tubes outlining door frames and wall edges
dark matte walls creating an enclosed narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, dark corridor where the only light comes from green neon strips framing the doorways. The space is enclosed and shadowy, with reflective marble floors. The camera moves through the corridor and turns to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury lounge seating area with low furniture

events.description: exiting the dark corridor back into the warmly lit main lounge
turning to explore the low seating platform area

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area past low seating cushions and ambient lighting

entered.detail: ceiling featuring wavy wooden slats with integrated lighting
raised platform with large cushions and low tables for lounging
wall with vertical lighting strips creating a soft glow

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark corridor, the camera returns to the main lounge now viewed from the opposite side. The space features a distinctive wavy wooden ceiling, low seating platforms with large cushions, and warm ambient lighting. The camera explores the seating area as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a luminous, high-tech lounge into a shadowy neon corridor before returning to the warmth of the living space. It begins by passing through a wooden slatted partition into a dimly lit room where a large blue holographic jellyfish floats above modern low furniture and warm floor lighting. As the camera moves past the hologram, the environment shifts toward a darker transition area adorned with abstract artwork, leading directly to a doorway framed in green neon. The scene then narrows into a dark, enclosed corridor with reflective marble floors and glowing green strips before the camera turns to exit the passage. Finally, the view opens back up into the main lounge from a new perspective, revealing a wavy wooden ceiling and plush seating platforms under a soft, ambient glow.
